page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-tee.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance allocates a single thread per core to ensure dedicated, non-shared compute resources. It features 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary differentiator of this instance is its integrated hardware acceleration, featuring a single GPU equipped with 96 GB of dedicated VRAM. This massive VRAM capacity is paired with the system's 96.0 GB of system memory, creating a balanced environment for memory-intensive accelerator workloads. The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Given the high VRAM-to-system-RAM ratio and dedicated physical cores, the ecs.gn8v-tee.4xlarge is designed for workloads requiring substantial parallel processing and large memory footprints on the accelerator. This includes deep learning model training, large-scale LLM inference, high-performance data science, and complex rendering tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high VRAM density position this instance as a specialized resource where workloads benefit from predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-tee.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor operating at 2.6 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture and KVM virtualization, the instance provides 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute performance. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory and a single GPU with 96 GB of VRAM, offering a high ratio of accelerator memory to system memory. The instance lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads that demand significant GPU memory, such as deep learning inference, data science pipelines, and parallel computing tasks, offering a predictable and high-density resource allocation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v-tee.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 96 GB of system RAM, and a single GPU featuring 96 GB of VRAM for demanding parallel computing workloads.

tagline: A dedicated compute instance featuring a high-capacity accelerator with ninety-six gigabytes of VRAM for intensive parallel processing workloads.
